messages.content: Design me 2stage evolution starter pokemon with portmanteau for each pokemon and named dormonitor with pokedex, stats and fake move set with portmanteau

Certainly! Here are two starter Pokémon with two-stage evolution, named Dormonitor. 

1. First-stage Pokémon: Dormirex
- Portmanteau: "Dormir" (French for "to sleep") + "Rex" (Latin for "king")
- Type: Psychic
- Pokédex Entry: Dormirex, the Slumbering Pokémon. This drowsy Pokémon spends most of its time napping. It has the ability to enter the dream world, where it gains knowledge and hones its psychic abilities.
- Base Stats:
  - HP: 50
  - Attack: 30
  - Defense: 40
  - Special Attack: 60
  - Special Defense: 50
  - Speed: 40
- Fake Move Set:
  - Hypnosis (Psychic, Status)
  - Confusion (Psychic, Special)
  - Astonish (Ghost, Physical)
  - Rest (Psychic, Status)

2. Second-stage Pokémon: Moniterror
- Portmanteau: "Monitor" (referring to observation) + "Terror"
- Type: Psychic/Dark
- Pokédex Entry: Moniterror, the Watchful Pokémon. This ominous Pokémon strikes fear into its opponents by peering into their deepest fears. It can predict their moves and exploit their vulnerabilities.
- Base Stats:
  - HP: 75
  - Attack: 60
  - Defense: 75
  - Special Attack: 105
  - Special Defense: 80
  - Speed: 70
- Fake Move Set:
  - Night Slash (Dark, Physical)
  - Psybeam (Psychic, Special)
  - Dark Pulse (Dark, Special)
  - Psychic Terrain (Psychic, Status)

Please note that these Pokémon and their moves are fictional creations and not official additions to the Pokémon series.
